basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Sr. Project Scientist Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for the Sr. Project Scientist post. 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st class or equivalent Master's degree with at least three years of experience in an area related to higher education, education policy or innovation.
qualification.details: 1st class or equivalent Master's degree with at least three years of experience in an area related to higher education, education policy or innovation. Essential skills: Demonstrated skills include collecting and analysing qualitative data. Track record of publishing in international journals in the areas of interest. Prior experience in policy-related applied or academic research. Desirable skills: An understanding of the literature on transnational skills, research commercialization and technology transfer. Assist in developing new research and funding proposals.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sr. Project Scientist post at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting completed applications by email is 10 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st class or equivalent Master's degree along with at least three years of relevant experience in higher education, education policy, or innovation.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 60,750 to Rs. 79,260, plus HRA at 30%.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves short-listing of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this position through email only.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Essential skills include demonstrated ability in collecting and analyzing qualitative data, a track record of publishing in international journals, and prior experience in policy-related research.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any desirable skills mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: Yes, desirable skills include an understanding of literature on transnational skills, research commercialization, and technology transfer, as well as the ability to assist in developing new research and funding proposals.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
